name: Library Assistant
description: Predictable on-campus work with modest pay.

name: Campus Rec Attendant
description: Steady campus hours with manageable stress.

name: Barista
description: Decent pay, but rushes and customers wear you down.

name: Food Delivery
description: Flexible shifts with higher strain and unstable nights.

name: Tutoring
description: Good pay per hour if you can stay sharp enough to teach.
